creator: val@packett.cool
text:
(In reply to Oleksandr Tymoshenko from comment #22)
nice, thanks for the patch! I'll try it soon.

Re: devd, libu2f-host installs /usr/local/etc/devd/u2f.conf.sample. But it's slightly wrong (it only works on /dev/usb/*, doesn't touch /dev/uhid*). What do you think about a separate port that creates the u2f group and installs a /usr/local/etc/devd/u2f.conf (not sample) that does both? And libu2f-host, chromium, firefox will all depend on it.
